statement.latex: (P.\,Longobardi, M.\,Maj, A.\,H.\,Rhemtulla). Let$w = w(x_1, , x_n)$be a group word in$n$variables$x_1, , x_n$, and$V(w)$the variety of groups defined by the law$w= 1$.
